root_cause_fixes.issue: Python version authority drift: AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md claimed Python 3.9 but pyproject.toml requires >=3.12
root_cause_fixes.fix_description: Corrected AGENTS.md and CLAUDE.md from Python 3.9 to Python 3.12 to match pyproject.toml requirement and actual venv (3.12.13)
root_cause_fixes.current_code_proof: AGENTS.md line 7: Python 3.12; CLAUDE.md line 6: Python 3.12

root_cause_fixes.fix_description: Replaced hardcoded path with glob-based discovery: _find_canonical_receipt() scans *_final_attestation.json for receipt_type=superseding_receipt and superseded_by=null. Multiple-terminal-receipt rejection.
root_cause_fixes.test_evidence: 19/19 SDK contract tests pass including TestGenericReceiptDiscovery

code_fixes_summary.subject: fix(pr23): correct Python version in AGENTS.md + CLAUDE.md (3.9→3.12), remove unused variable in validator
fix(ci): pin ruff to >=0.15,<0.16, add ruff config, fix PYI036 in SDK
